notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 (Wikipedia x2, palquest.org, Al Jazeera encyclopedia): Palestinians date the Nakba to May 15, 1948, the day after Israel's declaration of independence (May 14, 1948); displacement estimates range 700,000-800,000 (reported the range honestly instead of asserting one figure).
Verified Yasser Arafat's 1998 proposal to formally commemorate the 50th Nakba anniversary annually on May 15.

Implemented backlog's specific winning angle: answered the 'كم مرت من سنوات' (how many years since) date-intent with an evergreen calculation method (subtract 1948 from the current year) instead of a hardcoded number that would go stale and trip hasHardcodedYear next year.

Most politically sensitive topic in this batch — strict neutral, dual-narrative factual register maintained (presents both the Israeli 'founding day' framing and the Palestinian 'start of displacement' framing without editorializing), per the site's standing Palestine content rule.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ps), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
